Class ViewPostDetail

java.lang.Object
guiViewPost.ViewPostDetail
public class ViewPostDetail extends Object

Title: ViewPostDetail Class.

Description: Displays the full content of a single Post together with all of its Replies. Users can write a new reply, edit or delete their own replies, and mark the post as resolved. The post body is shown in a read-only TextArea at the top. Below it, replies are listed in a ListView. A reply composition TextArea sits at the bottom. Instructor replies are visually distinguished by a "[Instructor]" prefix in the ListView so students can immediately identify official answers — mirroring Ed Discussion's green checkmark convention.

Copyright: CSE 360 Team Project © 2025

Version:
1.00 2025-02-25 Initial version for HW2
Author:
Team

  • Method Details

    • displayPostDetail

      public static void displayPostDetail(javafx.stage.Stage ps, User user, Post post)
      Displays the post detail page.
      Parameters:
      ps - the JavaFX Stage for this view
      user - the currently logged-in User
      post - the Post to display

    • populateReplies

      public static void populateReplies(ReplyList rl)
      Clears and repopulates the replies ListView from currentReplies. Instructor replies get a bold "[Instructor]" prefix so they stand out.

    • getSelectedReply

      public static Reply getSelectedReply()
      Returns the Reply at the selected ListView index, or null.

    • setError

      public static void setError(String msg)
      Sets the error message label.
      Parameters:
      msg - the error message to display
